title: Mandian
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Mandian''''' was a picket [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Its [[Commander/Legends|commander]] was [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dondo Foth]] and its [[Executive officer/Legends|executive officer]] was [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Vitwroth]]. Its crew included a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] called "[[Yeoman Scrapheap]]" and it had a storage compartment termed the "[[Lucky Bag]]." It participated in the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]], and was assigned to monitor the system for incoming craft. When a fleet of [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] reinforcements arrived, Foth notified the Republic fleet of their presence before ordering the ''Mandian'' to retreat.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]''
